title: Pudding’s Betrayal Is Revealed
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Brook, Reiju, Chopper, Brûlée, Sanji, Luffy as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: God, he was so ugly! Can you believe it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who the hell would ever want to marry a failure like you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At least bring me a proper prince, for Heaven's sake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you really want a copy of this slab of stone more than you want Sanji back?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why I suspected that he would never return to us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have no idea what kind of trap to you all may have waiting for us all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But because of how incredibly kind-hearted he is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will refuse to budge once he's decided to sacrifice himself for the sake of others!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On the other hand, we also have a captain who breaks through any and all walls in order to pursue his beliefs and ambitions.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How things end up with Sanji... will be decided solely amongst those two!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not quite! Even if, in the worst case scenario, Sanji decides to never return to us...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We would never want him to feel a single drop of guilt.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And so in order to be able to show him that we've gained something amazing out of this trip, even if we don't end up leaving with him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will be completing my task ...of getting away with this road poneglyph!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mamama... your so-called "worst case scenario" ain't even that bad!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If Sanji decides to never return?! That's your worst case scenario?! Are you sure nobody is going to end up getting killed on this trip?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aeck, everyone you cherish might end up dying because of this journey!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Young lady... What kind of fool...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll tell you! I'll tell yooooo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Quick, tell us! Where is the castle?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to get you ALL ONE DAY! Wheeze, wheeze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I don't remember, you little twat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We all obviously know what we're reflecting at the moment!

dialogue.speaker: Brûlée
dialogue.text: Mirror, oh Mirrors!! Which one of you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the mirror that connects to Master Gallet's closet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the hand mirror located in the 2nd floor guestroom!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the mirror from the 4th floor women's bath-room!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who's currently reflecting Luffy, Nami, Brook and Pedro?!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Master Sanji just passed by me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm pretty ace at drawing portraits!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 62 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
